file_insights.changes_summary: Complete rewrite of root URL configuration from basic stub to comprehensive API versioning structure
key_additions: Health check endpoints for monitoring and load balancers
API root endpoint with available endpoints documentation
API v1 versioned URL patterns with namespace support
Comprehensive URL structure documentation in docstring
Development-only configurations (media serving, debug toolbar, DRF auth)
Future-ready API versioning structure (v2 path commented)
structural_patterns: Extensive comments for future endpoint inclusions

patterns_discovered.description: Uses Django's include() with tuple syntax (api_v1_patterns, 'api') and namespace='api-v1' to enable future API versions while maintaining backward compatibility
patterns_discovered.significance: Allows seamless addition of api/v2/ in future without breaking api/v1/ clients

patterns_discovered.description: All endpoint includes are defined as comments, showing future module structure without creating circular import issues
patterns_discovered.significance: Provides clear roadmap while avoiding import errors during development

patterns_discovered.description: Multiple health check paths (/health/ and /healthz/) for compatibility with different monitoring systems
patterns_discovered.significance: Supports both traditional load balancers and Kubernetes health probes
patterns_discovered.implementation_detail: Returns JSON response with status, service name, and API version

patterns_discovered.description: DEBUG conditional block handles media serving, debug toolbar, and DRF browsable API
patterns_discovered.significance: Prevents production serving of static files and debug tools
patterns_discovered.safety_features: Try-except for debug_toolbar import, conditional media/static serving

patterns_discovered.description: Extensive docstring describing URL structure and visual ASCII layout of endpoints
patterns_discovered.significance: Serves as API contract documentation and developer reference
patterns_discovered.includes: Clear endpoint hierarchy, module organization, and resource naming conventions

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: All app-specific URL includes are commented out
gotchas_discovered.implication: URL patterns will fail if any included app module doesn't exist yet, but commenting prevents this issue
gotchas_discovered.workaround_used: Comments with path() definitions show future structure without causing import errors

gotchas_discovered.implication: Code assumes STATICFILES_DIRS exists and has at least one element during DEBUG mode
gotchas_discovered.risk_level: Low - falls back to STATIC_ROOT if list is empty
gotchas_discovered.code_location: Line in DEBUG block: settings.STATICFILES_DIRS[0] if settings.STATICFILES_DIRS

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Debug toolbar import wrapped in try-except
gotchas_discovered.implication: Debug toolbar won't be available if not installed, but gracefully handles ImportError
gotchas_discovered.interpretation: Indicates optional dependency pattern - good practice for development tools

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: API root endpoint hardcodes endpoint list
gotchas_discovered.implication: Must manually update api_root() function when new endpoints are added
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Consider using introspection or configuration to auto-generate endpoint list

approach_outcome.description: Root URL configuration comprehensively implemented with API versioning structure
key_achievements: Established clear URL hierarchy with /api/v1/ versioning pattern
Created extensible structure for future API versions
Implemented health check endpoints for monitoring
Provided complete roadmap of planned modules via commented includes
Added development-only configurations without polluting production
approach_outcome.architectural_readiness: Foundation is complete for incremental app URL integration
approach_outcome.notes: Structure is well-documented and future-proof. All endpoint implementations can now be added incrementally without modifying main URL configuration

recommendations.recommendation: Implement dynamic endpoint list generation in api_root() view
recommendations.rationale: Current hardcoded endpoint list in api_root() requires manual updates; could use Django's URL routing introspection

recommendations.recommendation: Add EMENUM_API_VERSION to Django settings as a configurable constant
recommendations.rationale: Currently uses getattr with fallback; should be explicitly defined in settings for clarity

recommendations.recommendation: Create API_STRUCTURE.md file documenting the endpoint hierarchy
recommendations.rationale: Current docstring is good, but separate documentation helps onboarding

recommendations.recommendation: Plan authentication middleware/decorators early in core.urls implementation
recommendations.rationale: JWT endpoints are commented but auth strategy should be defined before implementing individual app endpoints

recommendations.recommendation: Add 404 handler or catch-all pattern with helpful error message
recommendations.rationale: Currently unimplemented endpoints will return 404; could guide users to /api/v1/ root with available endpoints
